## Safety warning

Do not post private keys, seed phrases, exchange credentials, or screenshots exposing wallet secrets.

## Change type

- [ ] Add wallet
- [ ] Deactivate wallet
- [ ] Replace wallet
- [ ] Metadata correction

## Campaign ID


## Old wallet ID/address

Use `N/A` for new wallets.

## New wallet ID/address


## Controller type

- [ ] single_maintainer
- [ ] multisig_2_of_3
- [ ] multisig_3_of_5
- [ ] organization_controlled

## Verification

- [ ] Address verified outside GitHub
- [ ] At least two maintainers reviewed
- [ ] Address-change report will be published
- [ ] Old address remains in history as inactive if replaced
